mapper.select: select v.id, name, unit, fee_key_id, fee_key_name from (select id, name, unit, fee_key_id from fee_value where is_deleted = 0 and id in (select fee_value_id from apartment_fee_value where is_deleted = 0 and apartment_id = #{id})) v left join (select id, name fee_key_name from fee_key where is_deleted = 0) k on v.fee_key_id = k.id
